hero.headline: Rooms & flatmates,
hero.subhead: Pokojowo is a quieter way to find a home. Browse handpicked rooms, meet flatmates who actually fit, and skip the noise of generic listings.

pathways.title: A room of your own,
pathways.italic: or someone to share it with.
pathways.description: Pick the path that suits you today — you can switch between them whenever you like.

rooms.title: Browse rooms
rooms.description: A short, hand-reviewed shortlist of apartments and rooms across Warsaw, Krakow, Wroclaw and beyond.

flatmates.title: Find a flatmate
flatmates.description: Meet people who fit your routine, not just your budget. Lifestyle-aware matches with mutual interest at the heart.

one.title: Tell us how you live
one.description: A short profile — sleep schedule, cleanliness, guests, work-from-home — gets us most of the way there.

two.title: Browse rooms or meet flatmates
two.description: Open the index for hand-reviewed rooms, or open your matches for people who fit your routine.

three.title: Connect when it feels right
three.description: Mutual interest opens a private chat. No cold outreach, no copy-pasted messages, no noise.

manifesto.title: Find a flatmate who actually
manifesto.description: Sign in or create your profile to see compatibility scores, mutual matches, and the people who quietly liked yours back.

hosts.title: Have a room to rent?
hosts.description: List your space with Pokojowo and we'll match you with verified, compatible tenants — not strangers passing through.
